title: make_did_key() + validate_did_key() helpers in identity.rs
description:
Add two pure functions to core/src/identity.rs and export them from core/src/lib.rs.

What: Implement make_did_key() and validate_did_key() as foundational helpers.

Algorithm:
1. Add const ED25519_MULTICODEC: &[u8] = &[0xed, 0x01]; at top of identity.rs
2. Add: pub fn make_did_key(key_bytes: &[u8; 32]) -> String
   a. Build payload: [0xed, 0x01, ...key_bytes] (34 bytes total)
   b. Return format!("did:key:{}", multibase::encode(multibase::Base::Base58Btc, &payload))
3. Add: pub fn validate_did_key(s: &str) -> Result<()>
   a. Check s.starts_with("did:key:z") — return Err(anyhow!("invalid did:key prefix")) if not
   b. multibase::decode(s[8..]) — return Err on parse failure
   c. Verify decoded base is Base58Btc
   d. Verify decoded bytes length == 34
   e. Verify first 2 bytes are [0xed, 0x01]
   f. Return Ok(())
4. Add use multibase; (multibase is already in workspace Cargo.toml)
5. Export: add pub use identity::{make_did_key, validate_did_key}; to lib.rs

Defensive programming:
- validate_did_key() must NEVER panic; every error path returns Err(anyhow!(...))
- No key material in error messages
- validate_did_key receives untrusted wire input — treat as hostile

Agent team: standard (R + I + T)
- R: reads identity.rs, auth.rs, and multibase API docs
- I: implements the two functions
- T: derives test vectors from W3C did:key spec and multibase spec independently

Tests:
- make_did_key_known_vector: Use a known 32-byte test key (all zeros: [0u8; 32]) and verify output matches hand-computed did:key value (independently computed: base58btc([0xed, 0x01, 0x00*32]) = z6MkiTBz1ymuepAQ4HEHYSF1H8quG5GLVVQR3djdX3mDooWp or similar — compute independently via multibase::encode on test vector)
- validate_did_key_accepts_valid: generate a real keypair, call make_did_key, call validate_did_key — must return Ok(())
- validate_did_key_rejects_bad_prefix: "notdid:key:z123" -> Err
- validate_did_key_rejects_hex_pubid: "abcd1234" * 16 (64-char hex) -> Err (must not confuse old format with new)
- validate_did_key_rejects_wrong_multicodec: encode [0x12, 0x20, ...32bytes] (SHA2-256 prefix) -> Err
- validate_did_key_rejects_truncated: "did:key:z6Mk" -> Err
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p agora-core make_did_key validate_did_key passes; cargo clippy -p agora-core -- -D warnings clean; cargo fmt -p agora-core -- --check clean
